div.head: 267. Editorial Note
div.p: On November 20 and 21, 1961, Ambassador Galbraith conveyed his views on Viet-Nam to President Kennedy in two telegrams which are printed in United States-Vietnam Relations, 1945-1967, Book 11, pages 406-409 and 410-418. See also Galbraith, Ambassador’s Journal, pages 250 ff.
